title: Polish Ackee Stir Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Polish-inspired dish featuring ackee stir-fried to perfection with a creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped fried onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the flaked ackee to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion.
Return the cooked sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the shredded fermented sauerkraut and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and stir in the chilled creamy sour cream.
Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes or until heated through.
